name: Police Chase - Car & Bike Racing Game

reviews.review_description: As soon as I joined it I was super excited to play but as soon as I joined the level I wouldn't even spawn on the bike or car so I don't recommend
Its super buggy and only 2 maps, I do NOT recommend this

developer_response.body: We’re currently working on updates. If you have more suggestions, references, or ideas you’d like to see implemented, please feel free to share them with us at info@tulipapps.com. Your input helps us make the game better for everyone!

reviews.review_title: This is not a police chasing game
reviews.review_description: You can only choose between a motorcycle or police car. Those are the only options. There are no multiple police motorcycles or police cars. When you crash, nothing happens, no kind of dents or anything. You only have two levels that you can choose from. The other levels state coming soon. The levels that you have to choose from are very, very short. This game is pretty basic. There are no bustling city streets . Etc, you get what you pay for. So I'm not complaining too much. I just wish the levels were a lot better and longer. Nothing exciting it gets boring really fast. It would be nice if you had somebody to chase since you're in a police car or to run someone off the road , but it's nothing. Short little ride and back to the title screen again. Hopefully, they will make the levels longer and maybe put some more AI cars on there or something. Why did they name this Police chase when you're not doing any chasing.🤨🤔

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing our game. This was the first release. We will definitely work on your suggestions. You will see the betterments in coming updates. If you are interested in sharing more ideas regarding this game please share at info@tulipapps.com.
